title: get api health returns service health status
description: Verify that GET /api/health returns a 200 status with a JSON body containing the overall service status and integration probe statuses without requiring authentication.

title: get api health models returns model configuration diagnostics
description: Verify that GET /api/health/models returns a 200 status with a JSON body containing the effective text and image model configurations and environment flags without requiring authentication.

title: post api generate triggers synchronous content generation
description: Verify that POST /api/generate with a valid GenerateRequest and valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with a JSON payload containing generated caption, single_point, image_prompt, and asset_url.

title: post api generate stream streams generation progress via sse
description: Verify that POST /api/generate-stream with a valid GenerateRequest and valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with text/event-stream content type and streams SSE events indicating stages of generation and final result.

title: post api regenerate caption regenerates caption text
description: Verify that POST /api/regenerate-caption with a valid RegenerateCaptionRequest and valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with a JSON body containing the regenerated caption text.

title: post api regenerate image regenerates image prompt and asset
description: Verify that POST /api/regenerate-image with a valid RegenerateImageRequest and valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with a JSON body containing the regenerated image URL and prompt.

title: post api drafts creates and saves a new draft
description: Verify that POST /api/drafts with a valid DraftSaveRequest and valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with a message confirming save and the draft object including id, title, and status.

title: get api drafts lists drafts for authenticated user
description: Verify that GET /api/drafts with valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with a JSON body containing a list of drafts belonging to the authenticated user.

title: post api research viral runs viral content research workflow
description: Verify that POST /api/research/viral with a valid ResearchRequest and valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with a JSON body containing ranked viral posts, metadata, and parsed hooks.

title: get api settings reads per user settings
description: Verify that GET /api/settings with valid Authorization header returns a 200 status with a JSON body containing the authenticated user's settings object including professional_bio, writing_style_rules, brand_id, and publishing_config.
